revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

'''旧暦5月10日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶雲]]元年（[[704年]]_月_日） - 雲の瑞祥により慶雲に改元 * [[文久]]3年（[[1863年]]_月_日） - [[長州藩]]が[[下関海峡]]に碇泊中の米商船に砲撃 * [[明治]]4年（[[1871年]]_月_日） - 「新貨条例」公布。貨幣の名称を「円・銭・厘」とし十進法を採用。旧1両を1円とする
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（[[1846年]]_月_日） - [[和宮]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[綏靖天皇]]33年（[[紀元前548年]]_月_日） - [[綏靖天皇]]、2代[[天皇]] * [[寛政]]7年（[[1795年]]_月_日） - [[長谷川平蔵]]、[[火付盗賊改役]]（* [[1745年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月9日 (旧暦)|5月9日]] 翌日[[5月11日 (旧暦)|5月11日]] - 前月[[4月10日 (旧暦)|4月10日]] 翌月[[6月10日 (旧暦)|6月10日]] *新暦[[5月10日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: =忌日= 綏靖天皇年修正、長谷川平蔵を5月19日に移動
revision.text:

== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月3日]]） - [[和宮親子内親王]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[6月12日]]） - [[財部彪]]、[[軍人]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1949年]]）

{{Lunar May}} '''Lunar May11日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。 [[Category:Pages needing attribution]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:May 10 (Lunar calendar)]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

{{Lunar May}} '''Lunar May11日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。 [[Category:Pages needing attribution]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:May 10 (Lunar calendar)]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] == できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[708年]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745年]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183年]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274年]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月3日]]） - [[和宮親子内親王]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]） <!--* [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[6月12日]]） - [[財部彪]]、[[軍人]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1949年]]）--「[[財部彪]]」には「4月7日」と記載-->
== 忌日 == * [[綏靖天皇]]33年（ユリウス暦[[紀元前549年]][[6月10日]]） - [[綏靖天皇]]、2代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

== Births == * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月3日]]） - [[和宮親子内親王]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]） <!--* [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[6月12日]]） - [[財部彪]]、[[軍人]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1949年]]）--「[[財部彪]]」には「4月7日」と記載-->

revision.text:
{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
<== 旧暦5月10日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:Tomobiki]] である。
--> == Events == * [[慶雲]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[704年]][[6月16日]]） - 雲の瑞祥により[[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]から慶雲に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[6月25日]]） - [[長州藩]]が[[下関海峡]]に碇泊中の米商船に砲撃 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[6月27日]]） - 「[[新貨条例]]」公布。貨幣の名称を「円・銭・厘」とし十進法を採用。旧1両を1円とする
== Births == * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月3日]]） - [[和宮親子内親王]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]） <「[[財部彪]]」には「4月7日」と記載-->
== Deaths == * [[綏靖天皇]]33年（ユリウス暦[[紀元前549年]][[6月10日]]） - [[綏靖天皇]]、2代[[天皇]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}
[[Category:Pages needing attribution]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:Lunar May]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 10 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

<!-- 旧暦5月10日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:Tomobiki]] である。
--> == Events == * [[慶雲]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[704年]][[6月16日]]） - 雲の瑞祥により[[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]から慶雲に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[6月25日]]） - [[長州藩]]が[[下関海峡]]に碇泊中の米商船に砲撃 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[6月27日]]） - 「[[新貨条例]]」公布。貨幣の名称を「円・銭・厘」とし十進法を採用。旧1両を1円とする
== Births == * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月3日]]） - [[和宮親子内親王]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]） <「[[財部彪]]」には「4月7日」と記載-->

[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[慶雲]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[704年]][[6月16日]]） - 雲の瑞祥により[[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]から慶雲に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[6月25日]]） - [[長州藩]]が[[下関海峡]]に碇泊中の米商船に砲撃 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[6月27日]]） - 「[[新貨条例]]」公布。貨幣の名称を「円・銭・厘」とし十進法を採用。旧1両を1円とする
== Births == * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月3日]]） - [[和宮親子内親王]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]） <「[[財部彪]]」には「4月7日」と記載-->
== Deaths == * [[綏靖天皇]]33年（ユリウス暦[[紀元前549年]][[6月10日]]） - [[綏靖天皇]]、2代[[天皇]]

[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). <"{{ill|Takarabe Takeshi|ja|財部彪}}" records "April 7" as the birth date.>
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]

revision.text:
[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. == Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.

[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]

revision.text:
[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]

[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]

revision.text:
[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}}, {{ill|704|ja|704年}}) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}, {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}, {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}, {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}}) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}}, eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}, {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}}) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}}, 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]

[[sn:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|長州藩}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[ja:6月16日]]

== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[ja:6月16日]]

[[sn:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704年}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846年}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549年}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[ja:6月16日]] == See Also ==

[[sn:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year }} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year }} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year }} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year }} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year }} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year }} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[ja:6月16日]]

[[sn:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year }} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year }} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year }} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

[[sn:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[zh:五月初十]] [[en:draft:May 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year }} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year }} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year }} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
[[ja:6月16日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year }} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year }} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year }} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} .
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]]
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]]

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日|12=draft}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year|12=draft}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日|12=draft}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=draft}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王|12=draft}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇|12=draft}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year|12=draft}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇|12=draft}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇|12=draft}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft}} .
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft|12=draft}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=draft|12=draft}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初十]]

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 16|ja|6月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|704|ja|704th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft|12=draft}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=draft|12=draft}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|1846|ja|1846th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Princess Kazunomiya|ja|和宮親子内親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|ja|仁孝天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1877|ja|1877th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|549 BC|ja|紀元前549th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|ja|綏靖天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月10日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶雲]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[704年]][[6月16日]]） - 雲の瑞祥により[[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]から慶雲に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[6月25日]]） - [[長州藩]]が[[下関海峡]]に碇泊中の米商船に砲撃 * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[6月27日]]） - 「[[新貨条例]]」公布。貨幣の名称を「円・銭・厘」とし十進法を採用。旧1両を1円とする
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[7月3日]]） - [[和宮親子内親王]]、[[仁孝天皇]]の第八皇女・[[徳川家茂]]の妻（+ [[1877年]]） <!--* [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[6月12日]]） - [[財部彪]]、[[軍人]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1949年]]）--「[[財部彪]]」には「4月7日」と記載-->
== 忌日 == * [[綏靖天皇]]33年（ユリウス暦[[紀元前549年]][[6月10日]]） - [[綏靖天皇]]、2代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|May 10|qq=May 10}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|qq=}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839498]] Wikidata name: 10th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 10|qq=May 10}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|qq=}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|qq=|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|qq=|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|qq=|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|qq=|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初十]][[zh:五月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初十]][[zh:五月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初十]][[zh:五月初十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839498]] Wikidata name: 10th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 10|qq=May 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:June 16|June 16]] , [[:en:704|704]] ) - The era name changed from [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]] , [[:en:1863|1863]] ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 27|June 27]] , [[:en:1871|1871]] ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar [[:en:July 3|July 3]] , [[:en:1846|1846]] ) - [[:en:Chikako, Princess Kazu|Princess Kazunomiya]] , eighth daughter of [[:en:Emperor Ninkō|Emperor Ninkō]] and wife of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] (+ [[:en:1877|1877]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] 33 (Julian calendar [[:en:June 10|June 10]] , [[:en:549 BC|549 BC]] ) - [[:en:Emperor Suizei|Emperor Suizei]] , 2nd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] . == See Also ==
