== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|WD=Q2653|lt=June 16}} , {{ill|704|en|704|WD=Q23503|lt=704}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Taihō}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3}} , {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} ) - {{ill|Chikako, Princess Kazu|en|Chikako, Princess Kazu|WD=Q907048|lt=Princess Kazunomiya}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|en|Emperor Ninkō|WD=Q312351|lt=Emperor Ninkō}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi}} (+ {{ill|1877|en|1877|WD=Q7773|lt=1877}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}} , {{ill|549 BC|en|549 BC|WD=Q243600|lt=549 BC}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初十]][[zh:五月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初十]][[zh:五月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初十]][[zh:五月初十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839498]] Wikidata name: 10th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 10|qq=May 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|WD=Q2653|lt=June 16}} , {{ill|704|en|704|WD=Q23503|lt=704}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Taihō}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3}} , {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} ) - {{ill|Chikako, Princess Kazu|en|Chikako, Princess Kazu|WD=Q907048|lt=Princess Kazunomiya}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|en|Emperor Ninkō|WD=Q312351|lt=Emperor Ninkō}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi}} (+ {{ill|1877|en|1877|WD=Q7773|lt=1877}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}} , {{ill|549 BC|en|549 BC|WD=Q243600|lt=549 BC}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.

{{Not to be confused with|May 10|qq=May 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|WD=Q2653|lt=June 16}} , {{ill|704|en|704|WD=Q23503|lt=704}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Taihō}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3}} , {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} ) - {{ill|Chikako, Princess Kazu|en|Chikako, Princess Kazu|WD=Q907048|lt=Princess Kazunomiya}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|en|Emperor Ninkō|WD=Q312351|lt=Emperor Ninkō}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi}} (+ {{ill|1877|en|1877|WD=Q7773|lt=1877}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}} , {{ill|549 BC|en|549 BC|WD=Q243600|lt=549 BC}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} . == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|9|5|11|4|10|6|5|0510|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|WD=Q2653|lt=June 16|1=June 16}} , {{ill|704|en|704|WD=Q23503|lt=704|1=704}} ) - The era name changed from {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Taihō|1=Taiho}} to Keiun due to auspicious cloud omens. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25|1=June 25}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) - {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} fired upon American merchant ships anchored in the {{ill|Shimonoseki Strait|ja|下関海峡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimonoseki Strait|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関門海峡|1=Kanmon Straits|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q494894}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27|1=June 27}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) - The {{ill|New Currency Act|ja|新貨条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Currency Act|1=New Currency Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504131}} was promulgated, adopting the decimal system and establishing "yen, sen, and rin" as currency units. The old 1 ryo was set equal to 1 yen.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 3 (Intercalary May) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3|1=July 3}} , {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}} ) - {{ill|Chikako, Princess Kazu|en|Chikako, Princess Kazu|WD=Q907048|lt=Princess Kazunomiya|1=Chikako, Princess Kazu}} , eighth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|en|Emperor Ninkō|WD=Q312351|lt=Emperor Ninkō|1=Emperor Ninkō}} and wife of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi|1=Tokugawa Iemochi}} (+ {{ill|1877|en|1877|WD=Q7773|lt=1877|1=1877}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei|1=Emperor Suizei}} 33 (Julian calendar {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10|1=June 10}} , {{ill|549 BC|en|549 BC|WD=Q243600|lt=549 BC|1=549 BC}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|WD=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei|1=Emperor Suizei}} , 2nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} .
